creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Closing this as not a bug - As explained by Alex:
“nvidia.ko is a dependency of nvidia-modeset.ko, so it will be loaded automatically”

My experience is that only listing nvidia-modeset in loader.conf works well.

Aryeh - if you are still experiencing a failure to load with only nvidia-modeset listed, please let me know so we can re-open this bug.
